claim_bullets.bullet_text: The Carpenter is a JavaScript programmer with meticulous attention to detail (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.261-261).

source_record_text: 'The Carpenter' was a JavaScript programmer known for meticulous attention to detail and love for hand-crafted code. Recruiter Bob Plissken, known in the Python community, lined up a technical interview with a well-funded startup in San Francisco.
